title: OpenSearchSinkOptions
description: Configuration for the OpenSearch Sink module. Each sink references one or more IndexPlans which govern the physical index, indexing strategy, and vector field set.

opensearch_instance.title: OpenSearch Instance
opensearch_instance.description: Consul service name of the target OpenSearch instance.

plan_ids.title: Plan IDs
plan_ids.description: IndexPlan ids governing the indices this sink writes to. Must contain at least one entry; every referenced plan must exist and be in READY status or the sink rejects the request.

batch_options.title: Batch Options
batch_options.description: Controls how documents are batched for bulk indexing.

max_batch_size.title: Max Batch Size
max_batch_size.description: Maximum number of documents to include in a single bulk request to OpenSearch.

max_time_window_ms.title: Max Time Window (ms)
max_time_window_ms.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to buffer documents before sending a bulk request.
